column8: port td5_hud_draw_status_text mirrors orig: demo-mode/wanted-msg/TT-timer/best-lap branches preserved with timer=300/270 flash gate + MM:SS.HHH format; ARCH-DIVERGENCE struct-vs-offset access documented at :1745
port td5_render_radial_pulse mirrors orig 5-petal pulse: phase*=4.2/3000 cap, alpha=phase*0.31875, radius=w*phase/160, anim+=3328*dt, 0x4300199a depth, vertex slot mapping documented

orig sets _g_hudRadialPulsePhase=0 (re-enables pulse from start); port has td5_hud_radial_pulse_set() equivalent but no exposed reset stub — orig call site in BeginRaceFadeOutTransition is also stubbed (see td5_game.c:4374 comment)

port td5_hud_render_minimap mirrors orig walk: circuit-gate, clip rect, 16 bg tiles 0x4500 stride 0xB8, 48-segment loop with seg-end clamp, branch-quad delta, racer dots ±0x91 window, FP-to-float kFP=1/256

port td5_hud_init_minimap_layout mirrors orig: width/height=scale*100, dot=scale*7, world_scale=scale/1024, scandots/semicol/scanback atlas loads, 16-tile 4x4 grid, segment-table build with branch-mirror append
